caption: A man with dark skin, wearing glasses and a tall, grey, spiky wig, is seated in what appears to be a podcast studio. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders, and he wears black over-ear headphones. A black professional microphone is positioned in front of him. In the background, a wall is decorated with numerous framed photographs and some hanging apparel. Two logos are visible on screen: one reads "PODCAST" under a logo featuring "TALK," and another reads "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST." Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, with his mouth slightly open and shifting as he talks. His head moves slightly from side to side, but his general posture and the surrounding environment remain constant across the frames.
